title: GSR 860 (E) Regarding extension of tenure of Justice Shri S. B. Sakrikar, Commissioner
description: GSR 860 (E) Regarding extension of tenure of Justice Shri S. B. Sakrikar, Commissioner
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORlTY No. 588] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 22, 2001/AGRAHAYANA 1,1923 MINISTRY OF CHEMICALS AND FERTILIZERS (Department of Chemicals and Petrochemicals) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd November, 2001 G.S.R. 860 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 6 of the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing of Claims) Act, 1985 (21 of 1985), the Central Government hereby appoints Justice Shri S. B. Sakrikar, sitting Judge of the High Court of Madhya Pradesh to hold concurrent charge of the post of Commissioner for the Welfare of the victims of Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster, for a further period of one year with effect from the 15th September, 2000. This is in continuation of this Department's Notification No. GSR 924 (E) dated 21-12-2000. [F.No. 21/27/95-B.Cell] H. C. GUPTA, Jt. Secy. 3597 GI/2001 Printed by the Manager. Govt, of India Press Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054, -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
